cleanrooms.membership.CfnAbout: Creates a membership for a specific collaboration identifier and joins the collaboration.

cleanrooms.membership.CollaborationIdent.Description: The unique ID for the associated collaboration.

cleanrooms.membership.DefaultResultConfi.Description: The default protected query result configuration as specified by the member who can receive results.

cleanrooms.membership.QueryLogStatus.Description: An indicator as to whether query logging has been enabled or disabled for the collaboration.

cleanrooms.membership.Tags.Description: An optional label that you can assign to a resource when you create it. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value, both of which you define. When you use tagging, you can also use tag-based access control in IAM policies to control access to this resource.
